title: HRIS SAP Success Factor
description:
Responsibilities

  • Support SAP SuccessFactors implementation and provide ongoing support for all modules within the South Asia region.
  • Drive the successful deployment, optimization, and maintenance of our HR systems to support our HR operations
  • Identify opportunities for process automation, streamlining workflows, and improving data accuracy and integrity within SuccessFactors.
  • Track and report on the adoption rate of SuccessFactors modules within the South Asia region, including user engagement, completion of HR processes, and utilization of self-service features.


Requirements

  • Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology, Computer Engineering / Computer Science, System Analysis, or in related fields
  • Demonstrated proficiency in implementing and supporting SAP SuccessFactors modules, including Employee Central, Performance Management, Learning Management, Recruitment, Onboarding, and more. 
  • Strong understanding of HR system configurations, including data fields, workflows, permissions, and integrations to align with business requirements.
  • Proficiency in analyzing HR data, generating reports, and presenting insights to drive data-driven decision-making and process improvements.
  • Proven experience in providing technical support to end-users, resolving system issues, and ensuring system stability.

Interested applicants please send your resume to venessagoh@recruitexpress.com.sg

Venessa Goh Wee Ni

R24124686

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

EA License No: 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
